name: Convex (Real-Time Backend as a Service)
pricing_notes: Free: 1M function calls, 512MB storage; Pro $25/mo; usage-based

auth.notes: Deployment URL + auth secret; Clerk, Auth0, custom JWT integration

performance.notes: Real-time subscriptions; automatic cache invalidation; globally replicated reads

agent_readiness.notes: Real-time backend: database + serverless functions + file storage. Python client for scripting/automation; primary SDK is TypeScript. from convex import ConvexClient. client = ConvexClient('https://xxx.convex.cloud'). client.query('tasks:list'). client.mutation('tasks:insert', {'text': 'Buy milk'}). Real-time subscriptions via JS SDK. Automatic reactive invalidation. Functions as backend: queries, mutations, actions. Database with automatic type inference. ACID transactions. Scheduler for cron-like tasks.

gotchas: Python client is secondary — primary development in TypeScript
Vendor lock-in to Convex functions model
Limited query capabilities vs SQL (no joins, limited aggregation)
Learning curve for Convex reactive model
best_when: Real-time collaborative apps (chat, live dashboards, multiplayer)
Startups wanting real-time DB without managing WebSocket infrastructure
avoid_when: Complex SQL queries and analytics (DuckDB/PostgreSQL better)
summary: Convex is a real-time backend service: database + serverless functions + file storage. Python client: ConvexClient('https://xxx.convex.cloud').query('tasks:list'). Primary SDK is TypeScript. Automatic reactive queries, ACID transactions, cron-like scheduler. Best for real-time collaborative apps. Python client useful for scripting/automation; use TypeScript SDK for primary development.
